compositeBands.label: Nascent
compositeBands.text: You're at the start of noticing. That's not a low score, it's an honest one. Most of what shapes a conscious life hasn't become habit yet, it's still a choice you're making on and off. The archetype below is your lean, not your ceiling.

compositeBands.label: Developing
compositeBands.text: You're catching yourself more often than you used to. Some of this has become instinct, some of it still needs a reminder. That's exactly where growth actually happens, in the middle, not at the finish line.

compositeBands.label: Practising
compositeBands.text: This is showing up in how you actually live, not just how you think. It's becoming who you are on an ordinary Tuesday, not just on your best days.

compositeBands.label: Integrated
compositeBands.text: This isn't something you're working on anymore, it's something you already live by. That doesn't mean the work is over. It means it's stopped feeling like work.

disclaimer: The Conscious Check is a reflection tool, not a diagnosis. It's designed to help you notice patterns in how you already live, not to measure, rank, or clinically assess you. Your result is a mirror, not a verdict. Take what's useful, leave what isn't, and know that you can retake this as you change.

cta.supportingLine: Others got this result too. Come meet them.
